label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 13

extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked with 8km to go on Tourmalet, KUSS marked then counter-attacked catching everyone including roadsiders, JUMBO locked out podium
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD's 8km attack forced KUSS into policeman role before KUSS's devastating counter-attack caught all rivals cold.
JUMBO's early pace-setting on Aubisque deliberately cracked EVENEPOEL before decisive climbs, removing key GC threat early.
KUSS bridged 50-second gap to VINGEGAARD while still marking attacks, revealing unexpected elite GC form over domestique duties.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: dropped on Aubisque when JUMBO set tempo, lost 27 minutes, completely out of GC without illness excuse
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: took race lead by marking attacks then counter-attacking with such pace he had to brake for roadside spectators
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: marked attacks conservatively, saved energy while KUSS did policing work, benefits from VINGEGAARD's stage win tactics
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: finally cracked and dropped after hanging on, showing Bahrain lacks depth to counter three-pronged JUMBO attack
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: positive: survived high-quality breakaway on stage matching his earlier win, held position despite JUMBO's pace escalation
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: retained white jersey but dropped from virtual podium, revealing ceiling against JUMBO's triple threat
